title: Contact ESDC's programs - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact our programs: Employment and Social Development Canada
Your questions, comments and suggestions are welcome.
For media enquiries or to set up an interview, see Contact: Media Enquiries .
To access information about our employees, see Government Electronic Directory Services .

- Canada Student Financial Assistance Program

- Canadian Dental Care Plan
